page_content:
Prerequisite: Minimum grade of C- in HLSA300.

Restriction: Must be in Public Health Science program; and must have earned a minimum of 60 credits.

PHSC410 Public Health Program Planning and Evaluation (3 Credits) Students will become familiar with the dynamics of public health program planning, and the basic process of identifying unmet needs. They will be able to identify different types of program evaluation, including needs assessment, formative research, process evaluation, impact assessment, and cost analysis.

Restriction: Must be in Public Health Science program; and junior standing or higher.

Credit Only Granted for. PHSC410 or SPHL410.
